panel.title: Screenshot
settings.enableCross.label: Enable Crosshair
settings.enableWindowsSelection.label: Enable Window Detection
settings.enableWindowsSelection.descript: Allow clicking windows to auto-select their region on supported compositors.
settings.screenshotEditor.label: Screenshot Annotation Tool
settings.screenshotEditor.description: Tool used for annotating screenshots. Needs to be pre-installed.
settings.keepSourceScreenshot.label: Keep Source Screenshot
settings.keepSourceScreenshot.descriptio: Keep the temporary *_source.png file after saving the edited screenshot.
settings.savePath.label: Screenshot Save Folder
settings.savePath.description: Folder where edited screenshots are saved.
settings.recordingSavePath.label: Recording Save Folder
settings.recordingSavePath.description: Folder where screen recordings are saved.
settings.recordingNotifications.label: Recording Notifications
settings.recordingNotifications.descript: Show notifications when recording starts/stops or errors occur.
notify.dependencyMissing: A required dependency is not installed.
notify.screenshot.niriNotSupported: Niri is not supported for screenshots.
